items.text: The next stage of AI is here for the public sector. At Converge @ NPS, NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang spoke about how the NVIDIA DGX GB300 will accelerate AI research, education, and experimentation for @NPS_Monterey. The AI supercomputer will expand access to tools and compute needed to train models, develop applications, and solve complex challenges. This deployment will prepare the next generation of leaders to understand, develop, and apply AI responsibly.
items.author: @nvidianewsroom

items.text: The Genesis Mission is an investment in America’s future, and NVIDIA is proud to be an industry partner in this initiative to safeguard U.S. leadership in science.   This week, John Josephakis, NVIDIA Global VP for HPC, AI, and Supercomputing, joined leaders at the @scsp_ai AI+ Discovery summit to discuss this effort and the AI infrastructure needed to power the next generation of scientific discovery, innovation, and energy security.
items.author: @nvidianewsroom

items.text: Coincidentally AMD has a product named Verano. Competing with Nvidia's Vera CPU. The pun, Vera No writes itself. It's attached to MI500. It is on 2nm, and generally has more cores, memory. We described it back here in February. https://newsletter.semianalysis.com/p/cpus-are-back-the-datacenter-cpu

items.text: The AI era runs on servers. More of those servers are built in Texas. Today, NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang joined Wistron Chairman Simon Lin in Fort Worth to open Wistron’s first U.S. facility, producing Grace Blackwell compute boards, with Vera Rubin next.
items.author: @nvidia

items.text: R to @nvidia: Learn more about Wistron’s new Fort Worth facility and the advanced AI systems it will help produce: https://nvda.ws/4pusD8Q

items.text: NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang joined Wistron Chairman Simon Lin as Wistron opened its first U.S. facility in Texas, producing the GB300 Grace Blackwell Ultra Superchip. We’re proud to partner with Wistron as its global expertise strengthens U.S. manufacturing and the supply chain behind the AI era.

items.text: Congratulations to the students who competed at the International Mathematical Olympiad (IMO) 2026. 👏 We put Nemotron 3 Ultra to the test to take on the same problems in the same time limit, with no internet or external tools. The IMO team graded its solutions 30/42, above the 29-point gold threshold. 🥇
items.author: @NVIDIAAI

items.text: NVIDIA Spectrum-6, a 102.4-terabit-per-second Ethernet switch built for the Vera Rubin platform, is now arriving across the world's gigascale AI factories. @CoreWeave, @Microsoft, @NebiusAI @SpaceXAI and @Tesla are among the first to bring in Spectrum-6 to accelerate their AI factories. Read the Blog: https://nvda.ws/44AO2nn
